title: UE Lessons Courses Configuration
description: Course definitions used by the ue-lessons report command.

$schema.description: Path or URI of this JSON Schema, used by editors for validation and completions.

courses.description: Courses to include in console output and the generated PDF report. Leave empty until a course has been configured.

course.title: Course
course.description: One course whose exercise lessons contribute raw points toward a grade-point scale.

name.description: Display name printed in reports and listed in the PDF table of contents.

target_points.description: Grade points to evaluate in the target calculation. Defaults to 1 when omitted.

scale.description: Thresholds translating achieved raw-point percentages into grade points.

lessons.description: Completed and projected lessons contributing raw points for this course.

pointScale.title: Point Scale Threshold
pointScale.description: A minimum achieved percentage and the grade points awarded at that threshold.

percentage.description: Minimum portion of raw points required, expressed between 0 and 1; for example, 0.6 means 60%.

points.description: Grade points awarded when the required percentage is achieved.

lesson.title: Lesson
lesson.description: A single exercise lesson with available and achieved raw points.

max_points.description: Maximum raw points available in the lesson.

achieved_points.description: Raw points achieved or expected for a projected lesson. It must not exceed max_points.

projection.description: Whether the lesson is a future estimate rather than a confirmed result. Defaults to false.
